title: wedelia serra
intro: Wedelia serra, also known as Mexican Tarragon or Yellow Flower, is a flowering plant native to the Americas, belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia serra include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Wedelia serra can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
